leadText: The Academy Bottle (Japanese: スクールボトル School Bottle) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Academy Bottle serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player 's picnic.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A bottle emblazoned with the academy's emblem. It's light, sturdy, and vacuum insulated, so it'll keep your hots hot and your colds cold.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A bottle emblazoned with the academy's emblem. It's light, sturdy, and vacuum insulated, so it'll keep your hots hot and your colds cold. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Mesagoza (automatically obtained after beginning the Treasure Hunt)
